testcase.name: googleRegisterShouldCreateUserAndReturnTokens
testcase.system-out:
22:15:47.587 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.badmintion.authservice.integration.AuthFlowIntegrationTest]: AuthFlowIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:15:47.719 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.badmintion.authservice.AuthServiceApplication for test class com.badmintion.authservice.integration.AuthFlowIntegrationTest

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.3.5)

Found 2 JPA repository interfaces. 2026-03-25T22:15:49.554+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.cloud.context.scope.GenericScope : BeanFactory id=89f6734e-2bde-3b5c-939a-422a710b2f07 2026-03-25T22:15:50.994+07:00 WARN 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] trationDelegate$BeanPostProcessorChecker : Bean 'org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig' of type [org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerAutoConfiguration$DeferringLoadBalancerInterceptorConfig] is not eligible for getting processed by all BeanPostProcessors (for example: not eligible for auto-proxying). If this bean does not have to be post-processed, declare it with ROLE_INFRASTRUCTURE. 2026-03-25T22:15:51.343+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.hibernate.jpa.internal.util.LogHelper : HHH000204: Processing PersistenceUnitInfo [name: default] 2026-03-25T22:15:51.397+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] org.hibernate.Version : HHH000412: Hibernate ORM core version 6.5.3.Final 2026-03-25T22:15:51.467+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-03-25T22:15:51.653+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo : No LoadTimeWeaver setup: ignoring JPA class transformer 2026-03-25T22:15:51.675+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-03-25T22:15:51.834+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:auth_test user=SA 2026-03-25T22:15:51.838+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-03-25T22:15:52.956+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) 2026-03-25T22:15:52.996+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-03-25T22:15:53.788+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] eAuthenticationProviderManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with AuthenticationProvider bean with name authenticationProvider 2026-03-25T22:15:53.789+07:00 WARN 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] r$InitializeUserDetailsManagerConfigurer : Global AuthenticationManager configured with an AuthenticationProvider bean. testcase.name: googleLoginShouldAuthenticateExistingUserAndReturnAccessToken
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T22:15:56.092+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=google_login_user, email=google_login@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.092+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=google_login_user, email=google_login@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.153+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=google_login_user, role=USER 2026-03-25T22:15:56.154+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=google_login_user 2026-03-25T22:15:56.157+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received Google login request with rememberMe=false, tokenPrefix=google-id-to... 2026-03-25T22:15:56.157+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Google login attempt with rememberMe=false 2026-03-25T22:15:56.162+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Google login success for email=google_login@example.com, username=google_login_user, role=USER, subPrefix=google-s... 2026-03-25T22:15:56.162+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : google-login success without remember-me for username=google_login_user 2026-03-25T22:15:56.162+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Google login completed with role=USER

testcase.name: loginWithoutRememberMeShouldReturnOnlyAccessToken
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T22:15:56.169+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_no_remember, email=tester_no_remember@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.169+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=tester_no_remember, email=tester_no_remember@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.231+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=tester_no_remember, role=USER 2026-03-25T22:15:56.231+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=tester_no_remember 2026-03-25T22:15:56.236+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received login request for username=tester_no_remember, rememberMe=false 2026-03-25T22:15:56.236+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Login attempt for username=tester_no_remember, rememberMe=false 2026-03-25T22:15:56.360+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : password-login success without remember-me for username=tester_no_remember 2026-03-25T22:15:56.361+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Login completed for username=tester_no_remember, role=USER

testcase.name: loginRememberMeRefreshAndLogoutFlowShouldWork
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T22:15:56.370+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_login, token revoked 2026-03-25T22:15:56.574+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Logout completed for tokenPrefix=refresh-toke... 2026-03-25T22:15:56.576+07:00 INFO c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Refresh attempt with tokenPrefix=refresh-toke...

testcase.name: registerShouldCreateUser
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-25T22:15:56.586+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Received register request for username=tester_register, email=tester_register@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.586+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register attempt for username=tester_register, email=tester_register@example.com 2026-03-25T22:15:56.648+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.authservice.service.AuthService : Register success for username=tester_register, role=USER 2026-03-25T22:15:56.649+07:00 INFO 13584 --- [auth-service] [ main] c.b.a.controller.AuthController : Register completed for username=tester_register
